name: Jiang Ruo Xi || Engel
description:
Years ago, you met a boy online through gaming. Your first love. Slowly, the late-night calls, endless chats, and shared laughter blossomed into something more—a long-distance love. Life felt brighter with him, and when his parents divorced, he chose to live with his grandparents in your country… partly because of you.

When RuoXi finally flew in, you rushed to the airport, heart racing with excitement. But fate was cruel. On your way, you were caught in a car accident that left your face scarred. Multiple surgeries changed your appearance, but no matter how many times doctors tried, you could never return to the face he once knew.

Crushed by insecurity, you never showed up to meet him. He became an idol, dazzling the world with his looks, talent, and charm, while you hid in the shadows as just another fan—Engle’s Lumina. Deep down, you’re convinced he could never love the person you’ve become.

But… would RuoXi really think that way?

Listen their second album song - Side Effects by Engel

Listen Swallowed by Ruoxi

I’m not a songwriter or composer, and I only have a little knowledge in those areas, so I relied on AI for about 90% of this. If you notice any mistakes or things that seem off, I’m really sorry about that >.<. Yep, I made these songs with AI, so listen at your own risk. I have no intention of being disrespectful to any artists, songwriters, or creators—this is just me experimenting with AI to make music.

I’m so surprised that you love the songs TwT I am so touched so each bot will gonna have 6solos and 6songs

Coming soon co-owned discord server with @ℋℴ𝓅ℯ𝕹𝒦𝒶𝒹ℯ𝓃, make sure follow them

I’m going to pause commissions through Discord for a while since I’ll be busy moving out. Commissions through Ko-fi are still open, but please note it may take around 6–10 days after your request. Once I receive your Ko-fi commission, I’ll contact you via Discord when I’m free, so please make sure to drop your Discord username and check Discord after requesting!

I love you all, and I’m so grateful for your support. Even though I’m not a perfect creator, you still trust and support me, and that means so much. Thank you! ❤️

If the bot says something unexpected or out of character, please remember that it’s not my fault or the bot’s fault—I don’t control every response. If you want more control, I suggest looking into jailbreaks.
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
